description: The heavy-duty air compressor arrived in perfect condition, but the package was missing the custom industrial pressure gauge hose accessory pack that was listed in the description.

messages.message: Hi, I received the compressor, but the gauge hose pack is missing. Can you ship this immediately or issue a partial refund?

Dear John, we apologize for the oversight. It seems the pressure hose was packed in a separate small box that may have been left in our secondary warehouse. We can dispatch a replacement package today via DHL Express. Would that work?
